ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that collected the data */,
  "w" REAL /* Data from the W-axis sensor */,
  "x" REAL /* Data from the X-axis sensor */,
  "y" REAL /* Data from the Y-axis sensor */,
  "z" REAL /* Data from the Z-axis sensor */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "environmental_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental condition record */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location where the data was collected */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location where the data was collected */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the device at the time of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_environmental_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("environmental_condition_id") REFERENCES environmental_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., autonomous vehicle, drone) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or department responsible for the device */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor data */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval in days between calibrations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data being analyzed */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type involved in the analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis algorithm used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_sensors" (
  "device_sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-sensor association */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Calibration status of the sensor */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_sensors_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_sensors_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data that triggered the alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor involved in the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "action_required" TEXT /* Indicates if action is required in response to the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that was maintained */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_values" TEXT /* Calibration values for the sensor */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_calibrated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calibrated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device running the software */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the software */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the software was installed */,
  "installation_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who installed the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_versions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_versions_installation_by FOREIGN KEY ("installation_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device collecting the data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during data collection */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during data collection */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure during data collection */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude where the data was collected */,
  "gps_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the GPS location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
